case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. NAHUM MORALES ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17192012) AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, NAHUM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, NAHUM $5,878.69 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,163.69, SEE SCANNED DOC
